selection_reason: Latest loop recovery state carried an open concern that WP1 source feature work had not received independent E2/E4/QA review; continuous_loop rules require closing or carrying that concern before WP2.
preconditions: WP1 effect review detected without original state packet
Commit b9867ac9e is ancestor of current HEAD
acceptance: E2 performs narrow adversarial review of WP1 source contract.
QA performs WP1 acceptance gate review.
If PASS, close the shortened-chain concern.
If review finds non-blocking proof-quality concern, carry it explicitly into WP2 acceptance rather than pretending it is closed.
No file edits are made by subagents.
verification_commands: E4: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=helper_scripts/research python3 -m pytest -q helper_scripts/research/tests/test_cost_gate_learning_candidate_proof_evidence.py helper_scripts/research/tests/test_cost_gate_learning_proof_promotion_gate.py -p no:cacheprovider
E2: read-only git/source review of b9867ac9e
kill_gates: STOP_DISPATCH_BLOCKED if subagent dispatch cannot run
STOP_TEST if E4 or QA regression fails
STOP_EVIDENCE if E2 finding blocks WP1 gate and cannot be carried into WP2
STOP_BOUNDARY if runtime/order/private/MCP/live action is required
